title: The Unintended Consequences of Infrastructure Development
notes: EVENT STUDY REVIEWED. Gardner added — sits between SA (+1.36) and TWFE (+2.21) as expected. All 5 estimators show growing positive effect. Bancalari (2024). REStat. Table 2 Panel A Col 1: reghdfe vs_imr1y D, a(i t) cluster(i). TWFE coef = +0.74 (SE=0.42, p=0.08). 1,467 districts, 2005-2015. Staggered: sewerage project initiation across 11 cohorts (2005-2015). 22% never-treated (326 districts). CS uses notyet control group in paper (csdid ... notyet agg(event) long2). No time-varying controls in main spec. Event study window -6 to +7 (trimmed from -10/+10). Use analysis_district_clean_all.dta (NOT analysis_district_clean.dta). gvar_CS = Ei for treated (0 for never-treated). Paper finds CS ATT = +1.79 vs TWFE +0.74 (TWFE attenuated). TWFE exact match (0.737 vs 0.74). CS-NYT gap (R=2.77 dynamic, paper=1.79): ATT(g,t) individuais divergem radicalmente entre R native e pair-balanced — coortes tardias (2014-2015) têm valores extremos no R native (-8.6, -6.4) que puxam a agregação. R allow_unbalanced_panel=TRUE é a fonte principal — com 34% de dados faltantes (355/1467 unidades com painel completo), o pacote faz ajustes internos que divergem do Stata. Base period importa para o pré: varying (default do Stata) dá padrão de sinais diferente de universal (nosso default). Overall ATT pós-tratamento: pair-balanced NYT = 1.78 ≈ paper 1.79 (match perfeito). A divergência é exclusiva do pré-tratamento. Cohort 2005 (78 units) dropped by R att_gt (treated in first period, no pre-treatment base with universal). BJS fails (subscript out of bounds). | LESSON 8 CASE STUDY (2026-04-19, Bacon-attenuation acknowledged by paper): paper's own TWFE (+0.74) vs paper's own CS-DID (+1.79) gap = 2.4x is *acknowledged in paper text*. Bacon decomposition confirms mechanism: forbidden LvE/EvL pairs with cohort-2005-as-pseudo-control systematically negative, pulling TWFE coefficient down. 0 controls → no Spec A/B/C. All 5 estimators agree positive growing direction (t=0 +0.84 → t=7 +4.45). Paper-auditor EXACT (0.36%). 65% gap between our CS-NYT dynamic (2.95) and paper's CS-DID (1.79) is R-dynamic-aggregation vs Stata pair-balanced for late cohorts — documented technical artefact, not implementation bug.
